assertions.reason: A region watch was added through the watchlist UI, immediately showed visual new-match badges, and persisted across reload with its saved item and count intact.
evidence: /Users/tor/.factory/missions/8436c576-ab8d-4155-ae41-932a6b94051d/evidence/osint-advanced/watchlist-added-annotated.png shows the watchlist panel after adding region IR, including the toggle badge "Watchlist 1 +109" and panel badges "1 items" / "109 new".
localStorage stored mapr-watchlist with a persisted IR region watch item and mapr-watchlist-counts with 109 matches.

/Users/tor/.factory/missions/8436c576-ab8d-4155-ae41-932a6b94051d/evidence/osint-advanced/watchlist-persisted-annotated.png shows the same IR watch item after reload, with the toggle count still present and the panel still listing the saved watch.

assertions.reason: Selecting live stories exposed a narrative timeline with first-reported metadata, source-diversity chips, staged progression, and—on an Iran/Xi story—cross-regional spread into Lebanon and Beijing.
evidence: /Users/tor/.factory/missions/8436c576-ab8d-4155-ae41-932a6b94051d/evidence/osint-advanced/narrative-expanded-annotated.png shows an expanded story detail with the Story Timeline narrative panel rendered inside the news panel.

Narrative inspection for the "Iran’s war propaganda includes memes directed at Trump" story returned meta "First reported 2 days ago · Span: 1d 14h", diversity chips ["wire (2)", "local (1)"], and stages ["First Report", "Developing", "Continued Coverage"].

/Users/tor/.factory/missions/8436c576-ab8d-4155-ae41-932a6b94051d/evidence/osint-advanced/narrative-cross-regional-annotated.png shows the narrative panel for "Trump Confirms May Meeting with Xi Jinping as Iran War Forces Postponement", and inspection returned cross-regional matches for Lebanon and Beijing.

assertions.reason: The entity explorer graph opened a real entity detail panel from the live canvas graph, and using Show on Map returned to the home view with the entity filter breadcrumb and filtered event count applied.
evidence: /Users/tor/.factory/missions/8436c576-ab8d-4155-ae41-932a6b94051d/evidence/osint-advanced/entities-overview-annotated.png shows the Entity Explorer with the rendered graph canvas and type filters.

/Users/tor/.factory/missions/8436c576-ab8d-4155-ae41-932a6b94051d/evidence/osint-advanced/entities-detail-annotated.png shows a selected entity detail panel for O.J. with 14 mentions, 12 related events, and a visible Show on Map action.

/Users/tor/.factory/missions/8436c576-ab8d-4155-ae41-932a6b94051d/evidence/osint-advanced/entity-filter-on-map-annotated.png shows the home view after Show on Map, with breadcrumb text "Filtered by: O.J." and an active count of 1 events.

assertions.reason: With a persisted IR watchlist item in place, the app surfaced both badge-style and toast-style alerts when unseen matches were detected on the next live load.
evidence: /Users/tor/.factory/missions/8436c576-ab8d-4155-ae41-932a6b94051d/evidence/osint-advanced/watchlist-added-annotated.png shows the immediate watchlist badge state after adding IR: the toggle displayed +109 and the panel displayed "109 new".
/Users/tor/.factory/missions/8436c576-ab8d-4155-ae41-932a6b94051d/evidence/osint-advanced/watchlist-alert-annotated.png shows the follow-up live load used for alert verification.

Toast inspection on that follow-up load returned ["Velocity spike · Egypt · z=7.6", "109 new articles for IR", "Intel refreshed · 2815 stories"], confirming the watch-alert system emitted a real user-visible notification for the watched region.

frictions: The entity graph is an HTML5 canvas, so ordinary semantic node locators are unavailable; validation clicked the real canvas surface directly and then used the exposed detail-panel action for the map-linking assertion.

The watch-alert system determines “new” items by comparing current matches to persisted localStorage counts. To validate alert behavior without waiting for a 5-minute auto-refresh or forcing a heavy backend mutation, the isolated browser session preserved the real watch item and reset only the prior count snapshot before reloading.
